channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 and Galaxy Z Flip 7 are being tipped to come with One UI 8 on board
item.description: Samsung appears to be following Google in getting its next software upgrade out earlier than expected.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Dexterity Unveils Mech, World's First Industrial Super-Humanoid Robot
item.description: California-based robotics and AI company Dexterity introduces Mech, an industrial super-humanoid robot designed to revolutionize enterprise operations in logistics and manufacturing sectors.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Apple just made it much easier to get a handle on your inbox. Here’s how
item.description: Keeping our inboxes organized often feels like an overwhelming task. If you’re fortunate, yours contains only messages from people you wish to communicate with. Realistically, though, most are cluttered with newsletters, receipts, social media digests, and more.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: DoubleClickjacking hack turns double-clicks into account takeovers
item.description: Double-clicking is something we all do, often without giving it a second thought. But it could be giving hackers permission to do something dangerous.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to free up space on your Android
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy offers some of his easy expert tips to free up storage space on your Android if your device is running short on storage.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The White Lotus season 4: everything we know so far about the return of the hit HBO series
item.description: Season 4 is officially happening – let’s speculate about who's dying, who's lying, and where we’re flying.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft employees protest at 50th anniversary party over Israel contract
item.description: A pro-Palestinian protest by Microsoft employees interrupted the company’s 50th anniversary celebration Friday, the latest backlash over the tech industry’s work to supply artificial intelligence technology to the Israeli military.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump administration rolls back forest protections in bid to ramp up logging
item.description: President Donald Trump's administration has rolled back environmental protections around future logging projects on more than half of U.S. national forests under an emergency designation issued Friday that cites the dangers of wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Brown, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Chinese brand’s $2,000 Ryzen AI Max+ mini PC set to go on sale, with the first unit personally signed by the CEO of AMD
item.description: The GMKTec EVO-X2 sets new standards for mini PCs, with unmatched AI performance and a powerful Strix Halo APU.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Google Cloud Next ’25: What to expect
item.description: Google Cloud Next ’25, which runs from April 9-11 in Las Vegas ,will showcase the latest advancements and future directions of Google Cloud Platform and cloud computing in general.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: An AI avatar tried to argue a case before a New York court. The judges weren't having it
item.description: A man appearing before a New York court got a scolding from a judge after he tried to use an avatar generated by artificial intelligence to argue his case.
item.dc:creator: Larry Neumeister, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Microsoft celebrates 50 years of adapting to change
item.description: On April 4, 1975, two childhood friends, Paul Allen and Bill Gates, started what is today one of the world’s leading technology companies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How AI is steering the media toward a ‘close enough’ standard
item.description: The nonstop cavalcade of announcements in the AI world has created a kind of reality distortion field. There is so much buzz, and even more money, circulating in the industry that it feels almost sacrilegious to doubt that AI will make good on its promises to change the world.
item.dc:creator: Pete Pachal, Fast Company

item.title: Latest Nvidia RTX 5060 Ti GPU rumor suggests good news and bad when it comes to price
item.description: Hoping Nvidia might drop RTX 5060 Ti pricing compared to RTX 4060 Ti GPUs? You can forget that, but the good news is that a price hike isn’t rumored, either.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How to troubleshoot and reset Windows Update
item.description: Like it or not, those who use Windows Update to obtain and install updates, patches, and fixes will occasionally encounter issues. Sometimes, a specific update may not download. At other times, an update may fail to install. Every now and then, Windows Update (a.k.a.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Tariff war throws building of data centers into disarray
item.description: Enterprise IT leaders are facing a double-whammy of uncertainties complicating their data center building decisions: The ever-changing realities of genAI strategies, and the back-and-forth nature of the current tariff wars pushed by the United States. “This is obviously a fluid situation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Apple feels gravity as the Trump tariff hammer falls
item.description: Apple’s leadership is no doubt scrambling to identify a silver lining (if there is one) as the storm of US President Donald J. Trump’s punishing range of global tariffs rains heavily across the company’s supply chain.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nintendo's Switch 2 is bigger and better than its predecessor of eight years past as the video game developer pushes to bring its brand into “a new era" where social experiences are at the forefront.
item.dc:creator: RYAN KRYSKA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Accelerate cloud infrastructure initiatives with Lucid Software
item.description: Cloud and development operations (devops) teams are under constant pressure to do more, faster. They have outdated systems to update and manage, new systems to build, and requests from business units who need their support. It’s a velocity problem, and IT departments often struggle to keep pace.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: Coverage of Nvidia GTC 2025 With its legacy of innovation in GPU technology, Nvidia has become a dominant force in the AI market. Nvidia’s partners read like a technology who’s who list – e.g.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Meta is fined by Turkey after refusing to restrict content on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: Meta said it has been hit with a hefty fine for resisting Turkish government demands to limit content on Facebook and Instagram.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates reflects upon a 50-year-old computer code that reshaped technology
item.description: Even as he grows older, Microsoft founder Bill Gates still fondly remembers the catalytic computer code he wrote 50 years ago that opened up a new frontier in technology.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NetBox Labs launches drift detection tool to tame configuration chaos
item.description: NetBox Labs this week made available a new product that will help network teams detect and remediate configuration drift across sophisticated network environments before costly service disruptions or unplanned downtime affect services or applications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Why no one is challenging Trump's executive order that keeps TikTok running
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After TikTok was banned in the United States earlier this year, President Donald Trump gave the platform a reprieve, barreling past a law that was passed in Congress and upheld unanimously by the Supreme Court that said the ban was necessary for national security.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Red Hat Developer Hub adds analysis dashboard
item.description: Red Hat has updated Red Hat Developer Hub, an enterprise internal developer portal based on Backstage. The new release offers a developer preview of Adoption Insights, an analytical dashboard that details how Developer Hub is being used by development teams.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump to hold a meeting on possible investors to buy TikTok with possible ban at stake
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — President Donald Trump will hold a Wednesday meeting with aides about possible investors who could buy a stake in TikTok, a deal that could potentially stop the social media site from being banned in the United States.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte" to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SILVERMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Prioritizing an enterprisewide cyber culture in 2025
item.description: The three keys to building a resilient cyber culture is demonstrating leadership commitment, continually improving and staying flexible. The post Prioritizing an enterprisewide cyber culture in 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
